Only Known... Would Anything Differently?
many years have gone since divorce became final.
spend time looking back wondering where time gone.
longer recognize myself when look mirror.
Somewhere along line, lost bravery youth that made divorce difficult, possible.
Where that girl research stake catch pictures that needed prove husband's dishonesty?
Where young woman single handedly raised three children talented, loyal generous?
lost that part while busy being mom, dad, wage earner every other role have played during last decade.
spend time thinking about what things done.
think about things need done.
don't have time energy anything else what people need
think, think some more... wonder.
wonder about that might have done differently knew then what know now.
Today, know that does make mother cannot give 100% attention children hours each day.
fact, hard lesson learned that today, truly believe that teach children very important lesson teaching them that mothers have needs too.
need time feel just about anything everything.
need time less than perfect.
need admit that don't always have answers.
best message that send children that matter too.
teaching them this lesson, taught myself experience guilt daily reminder every time feel less than perfect mother.
This horrible lesson daughter, dangerous lesson sons.
What else have learned?
Sometimes it's important make changes.
Don't fearful.
Don't hang because fear.
know second marriage came about because fear.
About lose health insurance, married been dating, become friend.
Overwhelmed with responsibility taken everything went very bad, very quickly.
relationship ended violently.
blame myself making that decision.
divorced sadness, then remarried fear.
looked protector, when needed courage.
wrong.
trust myself take care myself financially.
Like stewardess tells oxygen masks before mask others, have spent life giving oxygen others.
idea.
have never, ever needs first.
sorry about that.
lost time" making decisions made.
Watching second child ready University, wonder late find myself.
With only more child home, time face some those choices.
While truly proud children, fearful facing truth; afraid what's come.
wondering will feel when faced with emptiness company.
longer need relationship.
over that long time ago.
most important things learned that unless happy alone, ready relationship with anyone else.
Fearing time alone, least know that life over there work done.
This time, this stage, working putting myself first.
It's about time.
